testcase.name: User Login to Guest Id
testcase.system-out: Given User Launch The Url...................................................passed When User Click The Login As Guest button...................................passed And User Click The Name.....................................................passed And User Click The Email....................................................passed And User Click The MobileNumber.............................................passed And User Click The Agree Icon...............................................passed And User Click The Login button in Guest login button.......................passed Then Next Page Shown........................................................passed When User Send The Mobile Otp and Verification..............................passed And User Click The Login button.............................................passed

testcase.name: User Check - Charts- functionality
testcase.system-out: And User Click the Watch List...............................................passed And User mouse over the scrip "Nifty 50"....................................passed And User Click the Charts...................................................passed And User Click the Candles Icon.............................................passed And User Choose Candle "candle".............................................passed And User Click the Mintues..................................................passed And User Choose One Minute..................................................passed And Verify One Minute Feed Connection Value and Wait One Minute Very Feed Connection Changes.passed And User Click the Five Minute..............................................passed And Verify Five Minute Feed Connection Valuebb..............................passed And User Click One Day......................................................passed And Verify One Day Feed Connection Value and Wait One Minute Very Feed Connection Changes.passed
